title: On The Divan.
content:
He who knows himself and others

    Here will also see,
    That the East and West, like brothers,

    Parted ne'er shall be.

    Thoughtfully to float for ever

    'Tween two worlds, be man's endeavour!
    So between the East and West

    To revolve, be my behest!
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On The Divan."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
